confirmed_building.scope_note: Exact mall identity confirmed before Gate 3 evidence review.

document_inventory.description: Public process context identifies building and structural document routes, but no target-specific NSCP or seismic design record was found for the confirmed building.

unresolved_exceptions.description: No public target-specific signed/sealed structural plan, seismic design basis, or design computation was found.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request target-specific structural design records from the owner, OBO, or engineer of record.

manual_request_targets.target: LGU Office of the Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask for target-specific civil or structural plans, design computations, and review records for the confirmed building.
manual_request_targets.reason: These records are commonly not published for private buildings.

manual_request_targets.request: Ask for signed and sealed structural design evidence tied to the confirmed building.
manual_request_targets.reason: Owner-held engineering records may be the direct custodian.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: No public evidence found for NSCP/seismic design evidence after the recorded searches.
overclaim_boundary.missing_evidence_statement: The absence of public target-specific records is only an evidence-availability result.

query_log.result_summary: No target-specific NSCP or seismic design evidence found.
No target-specific structural design record found.

packet_result.summary: No public evidence found for NSCP/seismic design evidence for the confirmed building.
